name: kismet-logtools
title: kismet-logtools
description:
wireless network and device detector
Kismet is a wireless network and device detector, sniffer, wardriving tool,
and WIDS (wireless intrusion detection) framework.
.
Kismet works with Wi-Fi interfaces, Bluetooth interfaces, some SDR (software
defined radio) hardware like the RTLSDR, and other specialized capture
hardware.
.
This package contains the Kismet logtools.

commands.name: kismetdb_dump_devices
commands.description: simple tool for converting the device data from a KismetDB log file to a JSON log

commands.name: kismetdb_strip_packets
commands.description: simple tool for stripping the packet data from a KismetDB log file

commands.name: kismetdb_to_wiglecsv
commands.description: simple tool for converting the packet data from a KismetDB log file to the CSV format used by Wigle

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kismetdb_clean because wireless network and device detector.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use kismetdb_clean as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `kismetdb_clean [options] [args]` as documented upstream for kismetdb_clean.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kismetdb_clean with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kismetdb_clean --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
